_metadata.description: Seed data for the toy_lines table

data.name: Robot Paradise
data.description: FansToys sub-brand for Soundwave family characters

data.name: Fantastic Model
data.description: FansToys sub-brand for core Autobot characters

data.name: Masterpiece
data.description: Hasbro's premium collector line targeting G1 accuracy

data.name: Generations
data.description: Hasbro's main collector line spanning multiple size classes. Includes War for Cybertron, Kingdom, Legacy sub-lines

data.name: Studio Series
data.description: Hasbro line focused on screen accuracy across all media (movies, cartoons, anime)

data.name: Masterpiece (Takara)
data.description: Takara Tomy's premium Masterpiece line (MP-XX numbering)

data.name: The Transformers (G1)
data.description: Original Hasbro G1 toyline (1984-1990). Includes all US-market sub-groups: Pretenders, Powermasters, Headmasters, Targetmasters, etc.

data.name: Fight! Super Robot Lifeform Transformers
data.description: Takara's first JP Transformers toyline (1985-1987). Japanese version of US G1 Seasons 1-3 toys, plus JP exclusives

data.name: Transformers: The Headmasters
data.description: Takara JP toyline (1987-1988). Headmasters, Targetmasters, Trainbots, Sixshot. Accompanied the Headmasters anime

data.name: Transformers: Super-God Masterforce
data.description: Takara JP toyline (1988-1989). Pretenders, Godmasters, Headmaster Juniors, Overlord. Many molds shared with Hasbro 1988 line but different characters

data.name: Transformers: Victory
data.description: Takara JP toyline (1989). Star Saber, Brainmasters, Multiforce, Breastforce, Dinoforce. Mostly JP-exclusive molds

data.name: Transformers: Zone
data.description: Takara JP toyline (1990). Powered Masters (Dai Atlas, Sonic Bomber, Roadfire), Micromasters. Final G1-era JP line with animated support (single OVA)

data.name: Transformers: Return of Convoy
data.description: Takara JP toyline (1991). Star Convoy, Grandus, Sky Garry. Story told through manga/story pages only. No animated media

data.name: Transformers: Operation Combination
data.description: Takara JP toyline (1992). Guard City, Battle Gaia, Micromaster six-teams. Final JP G1 line. Extremely rare. No animated media
